title: Efficacy and safety of eribulin mesylate vs. docetaxel or paclitaxel, combined with trastuzumab and pertuzumab, as first-line treatment for HER2-positive locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer: updated subgroup analyses of JBCRG-M06/EMERALD.
abstract: We performed updated subgroup analyses of the EMERALD study to investigate efficacy, safety, and quality of life (QoL) in patients treated with eribulin (E) vs. either docetaxel (DTX) or paclitaxel (PTX).
